page_metadata.biotools__summary: Chinese Millionome Database (CMDB), a database that contains 9.04 million single nucleotide variants (SNV) with allele frequency information derived from low-coverage (0.06×–0.1×) whole-genome sequencing (WGS) data of 141 431 unrelated healthy Chinese individuals.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Chinese Millionome Database (CMDB), a database that contains 9.04 million single nucleotide variants (SNV) with allele frequency information derived from low-coverage (0.06×–0.1×) whole-genome sequencing (WGS) data of 141 431 unrelated healthy Chinese individuals.
